certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact assessment process defined
Missing AI-specific governance, accountability, and audit trail mechanisms
Lack of continuous monitoring, performance metrics, and improvement loops for the AI components
No reference to data quality, model management, or transparency/explainability requirements
recommendations: Implement formal AI risk and impact assessments aligned with ISO 42001 clauses 6.1 and 6.1.2
Add documented human oversight protocols, decision logging, and escalation traceability
Establish ongoing AI performance monitoring, incident management, and continual improvement processes

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact assessment process defined
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
